title: Sort Metrics Alphabetically with Search Bar in Linking Flow
story: As a DataTools Pro user linking metrics to reports, I want the metrics list sorted alphabetically with a search bar, so that I can quickly find and select the metrics I want to link.
description: When relating and linking metrics (e.g., to reports or dashboards), the metrics list should be sorted in alphabetical order and include a search bar for filtering.
acceptance_criteria: Metrics list is sorted alphabetically in the linking flow
Search bar allows filtering metrics by name
ux_changes: Metrics sorted alphabetically in the linking/relating flow with a search bar for filtering.
comment_summary: Developer implemented and submitted for review on development.
